name: BEND ELECTRIC
address: 63349 NELS ANDERSON RD STE A, BEND, OR 97701

fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency response on this property could be achieved by ensuring that access routes to the main building are clearly marked and free from obstructions. Delineating designated pathways within the vehicle parking area could facilitate efficient maneuvering for emergency vehicles. Maintaining any landscaped areas in a way that does not encroach on access routes or entrances would support unobstructed movement and visibility for emergency responders. Additionally, implementing signage or marked zones within the parking area may assist responders in identifying appropriate staging locations during an emergency. Removing potential obstacles from key access and egress points could further enable quick response and streamlined operations.

wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing the defensible space around the structure by increasing separation between vegetation and the building could improve wildfire preparedness. Managing vegetation adjacent to fences may reduce fuel continuity and enhance overall property resilience. Reducing the density of trees and managing scattered trees more effectively can help maintain open terrain and prevent the potential spread of fire. Expanding open areas around the structure can improve defensible space, while maintaining the space free of combustibles may support firefighter access and suppression efforts. Prioritizing the clearance or modification of vegetation close to structures will also reduce the exposure of the buildings and reinforce long-term vegetation management plans.
